name: UNIFIED Re-Vendo-Matic KTECH (Karnataka Innovation & Technology Society)
desc: Developed an Al-driven recycling machine that accepts plastic bottles, crushes them, and rewards users with coupons based on weight. Integrated IoT for automation and real-time tracking, promoting sustainable waste management. Utilized Al, machine learning, and embedded systems to enhance efficiency and user engagement.

name: AI Voice Assistant
desc: Developed a multilingual voice-enabled assistant supporting Kannada, Hindi, and English for automated government form filling using NLP to interpret user inputs. The solution improves accessibility for non-literate users and minimizes manual effort and errors through an automated workflow.

name: StegoWorld: Secure Text Hiding with Multilingual Support
desc: A Python-based steganography tool to securely hide multilingual text in images using cryptographic techniques, ensuring data confidentiality.
